_publications._publicationTitle: Development of an adeno-associated virus vector for gene replacement therapy of NF1-related tumors.

_contextSnippet: The 333 AA version (NF1 AA 1200-1532) showed the highest expression and most potent inhibition of pERK1/2.
details: 333 AA GRD version showed highest expression and most potent inhibition of pERK1/2 in ST88-14 cells
